# Dormitory Communication System - Project Instructions

## Project Type
Next.js with TypeScript - A full-stack dormitory communication and collaboration platform.

## Key Features
1. Real-time chat system (group & private messaging)
2. Proposal creation system (cleaning, visitors, quiet hours)
3. Voting system (approve, reject, suggest modification)
4. Proposal modification (before unanimous approval)
5. Unread notification system
6. Login/logout floating menu
7. Dormitory-themed UI design

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14+ (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Shadcn/ui Components
- PostgreSQL/SQLite for data
- WebSocket for real-time messaging
- NextAuth for authentication

## Project Status
- Initialized and ready for development
